zh.lifeSummary: 當Reverend John Woodbridge V於1582年出生在英國維爾爾希沃斯時，他的父親John Woodbridge28歲，母親Jane Mercy Dudley24歲。他於1603年與Sarah Parker在英國英格蘭維爾爾爾德頓結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1637年12月9日在英國英格蘭維爾爾希沃斯享年55歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭維爾爾斯坦頓 聖 昆丁。

nameMeanings.name: Woodbridge
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Woodbridge in Suffolk or Dorset, both named from Old English wudu ‘wood’ + brycg ‘bridge’ (i.e. a bridge made of timber or one near a wood), or a topographic name denoting a person who lived by a wooden bridge or a bridge in or near a wood, from Middle English wode ‘wood’ + brigge ‘bridge’ (Old English wudu + brycg).
History: John Woodbridge (1613–95), emigrated in 1634 from Stanton in Wiltshire, England, to Newbury, MA, where he was pastor and magistrate.

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When Reverend John Woodbridge V was born in 1582, in Highworth, Wiltshire, England, his father, John Woodbridge, was 28 and his mother, Jane Mercy Dudley, was 24. He married Sarah Parker in 1603, in Cholderton, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 9 December 1637, in Highworth, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 55, and was buried in Stanton St Quintin, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Reverend John Woodbridge V est né en 1582, à Highworth, Wiltshire, Angleterre, son père, John Woodbridge, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Jane Mercy Dudley, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Sarah Parker en 1603, à Cholderton, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 9 décembre 1637, à Highworth, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 55 ans, et a été enterré à Stanton St Quintin, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Reverend John Woodbridge V è nato il nel 1582 nel Highworth, Wiltshire, England, il suo padre, John Woodbridge, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Jane Mercy Dudley, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Sarah Parker nel 1603, nel Cholderton, Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 9 dicembre 1637, nel Highworth, Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 55 anni, e fu sepolto a Stanton St Quintin, Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Reverend John Woodbridge Vが1582年にイギリスウィルトシュアイアヒグhウオルスで生まれた時，父John Woodbridgeは28歳，母Jane Mercy Dudleyは24歳であった。1603年にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアチオルデルトンでSarah Parkerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1637年12月9日にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアヒグhウオルスで55歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアスタントン スト クインティンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Reverend John Woodbridge V(이)가 1582년 영국 윌츠히르 히그h워스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Woodbridge(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Jane Mercy Dudley(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1603년 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 컬더턴에서 Sarah Parker(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1637년 12월 9일 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 히그h워스에서 55세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 스탠턴 스트 퀸틴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Reverend John Woodbridge V nasceu em 1582, em Highworth, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Woodbridge, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Jane Mercy Dudley, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Sarah Parker em 1603, em Cholderton, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 9 de dezembro de 1637, em Highworth, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 55 anos, e foi sepultado em Stanton St Quintin, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Reverend John Woodbridge V родился в 1582 г. в местности хаиворт, уилцхир, Англия, его отцу по имени John Woodbridge было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Jane Mercy Dudley, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Sarah Parker в 1603 г. в местности чолдиртон, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 9 декабря 1637 г. в местности хаиворт, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 55 лет и был похоронен в местности стантон ст куинтинь, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Reverend John Woodbridge V nació en 1582, en Highworth, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Woodbridge, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Jane Mercy Dudley, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Sarah Parker en 1603, en Cholderton, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 9 de diciembre de 1637, en Highworth, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 55 años, y fue sepultado en Stanton St Quintin, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
